## Backend task

### Summary

Describe the NestJS backend work for OpenCred.

### Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Backend module or API endpoint scaffolded
- [ ] No business logic implemented in initial scaffold
- [ ] Database configuration and entity definitions left as follow-up issues

### Notes

This repository intentionally avoids PostgreSQL, TypeORM, and concrete entity implementation at this scaffold stage.
